Description: npm run lint fails with react-hooks/set-state-in-effect error in use-preferences.ts
Actual Result: Error at use-preferences.ts:46 - setState called synchronously in effect
Root Cause Hypothesis: Intentional localStorage hydration pattern triggers the rule; needs justified suppression to keep CI green

Description: Match half-time line renders literal 'null' when only one of htHome/htAway is set
Reproduction Steps: Open a /match/[id] with htHome set but htAway null
Expected Result: Half-time line hidden or shows both values
Root Cause Hypothesis: Condition used OR (htHome!==null || htAway!==null) instead of requiring both

Description: setCountry preference setter is never consumed by any component
Root Cause Hypothesis: Preference API built ahead of UI; country selection never wired
Status: FIXED (removed unused setter; country read retained in stored shape)

Root Cause Hypothesis: Component built but not wired into any page

Description: Standings zone coloring thresholds hardcoded (CL<=4, relegation>=18) regardless of league size
Reproduction Steps: View a league with fewer than 18 teams
Root Cause Hypothesis: Heuristic placeholder; real qualification rules not modeled
Status: FIXED (relegation now computed as bottom-3 from table size, gated to tables >=10)

Description: PositionBadge receives 'total' prop but never uses it
Root Cause Hypothesis: Prop reserved for size-aware zones (see DEF-006)
Status: FIXED (prop now used for size-aware relegation zone)
